data.title: In the past 24 hours, the total amount of liquidated positions reached $311 million, with long positions accounting for $265 million.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, in the past 24 hours, a total of 101,396 people worldwide were liquidated, with a total liquidation amount of $311 million. Of this, long positions were liquidated for $265 million, and short positions for $45.34 million. The largest single liquidation occurred on Hyperliquid, involving the ETH-USD trading pair, and was worth $5.68 million.

data.title: $262,000,000 Drained From US Bank Accounts in One Year As FBI Issues Warning on Account Takeover Scams
data.description:
The FBI is warning the public about an epidemic of scams draining bank accounts across the country. In a new announcement, the agency says Account Takeover (ATO) scams have drained a whopping $262 million from individuals, businesses and organizations since the start of 2025.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/12/13/262000000-drained-from-us-bank-accounts-in-one-year-as-fbi-issues-warning-on-account-takeover-scams/

data.title: Tether's Expanding Influence in Finance and Technology
data.description: According to Odaily, Alex Thorn, head of research at Galaxy Research, highlighted Tether's extensive investment and business operations in a post on the X platform titled "Don't Underestimate Tether." Tether's USDT stablecoin has a circulation supply exceeding $185 billion. The company has diversified its investments into agriculture and robotics, operates Bitcoin mining and high-performance computing data centers, and is developing AI health applications (QVAC) and a private communication app (Keet). Recent reports indicate that Tether has become the largest centralized finance (CeFi) lending institution in the cryptocurrency sector, with loans surpassing $14 billion. Additionally, it has distributed over $10 billion in dividends to shareholders in the first nine months of this year.

data.title: Juventus rejects Tether’s ambitious takeover bid
data.description:
Juventus has turned down Tether’s offer to acquire the full shareholding in the Turin football club from Exor, Juventus’ principal stakeholder. According to reports, the Agnelli family, which controls Juventus, has stated that it does not intend to sell its majority stake in the club. Tether announced on Friday evening that they had tabled a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/juventus-reject-tether-takeover/

data.title: Galaxy Research: Tether's lending volume exceeds $14 billion, making it the largest CeFi lender.
data.description: According to Alex Thorn's analysis, Alex Thorn, Research Director at Galaxy Research, published an article on the X platform titled "Don't Underestimate Tether," pointing out that Tether has established a vast investment and business operations. The circulating supply of USDT, the US dollar stablecoin issued by Tether, has exceeded $185 billion. The company also invests in agricultural and robotics companies, operates Bitcoin mining and high-performance computing (HPC) data centers, and develops AI-powered health applications (QVAC) and a private messaging application (Keet). Furthermore, recent reports show that Tether is the largest centralized financial (CeFi) lender in the cryptocurrency space, with over $14 billion in loans and paying over $10 billion in dividends to shareholders in the first nine months of this year.

While Dimon notes the negative effect, his message to American […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jamie-dimon-warning-job-losses-tied-to-ai/
